title: Better error when illegal bit select of array

features.name: bit select on unpacked array declaration
features.description: Code should include a bit-select operation on an unpacked array, where the array is declared with a single-element range like wire b[0:0]

features.name: assignment from bit-select of unpacked array to scalar
features.description: Code should include an assignment where a scalar wire receives the value from a bit-select of an unpacked array
